scripts.build: npm run build:native && npm run build:ts && npm run copy:wasm
scripts.build:wasm: PATH=$(dirname $(rustup which rustc)):$PATH RUSTC=$(rustup which rustc) wasm-pack build ../rust/tachyon --target web --release --out-dir ../../node/src/ts/wasm
scripts.copy:wasm: mkdir -p dist/wasm && cp src/ts/wasm/tachyon_ipc.js src/ts/wasm/tachyon_ipc_bg.js src/ts/wasm/tachyon_ipc_bg.wasm src/ts/wasm/*.d.ts dist/wasm/
scripts.test:browser: npm run build:ts && npm run copy:wasm && node test/browser_wasm.spec.mjs
